description: This pipeline performs a series of image processing operations, starting with input data that undergoes various transformations, including filtering, thresholding, and feature extraction. The data is then processed in multiple parallel paths, involving additional filtering, masking, and analysis steps. The pipeline ultimately generates output data that has been refined and analyzed through these sequential and parallel processing stages, resulting in extracted features and transformed images.

874a0b0e-1787-4a9a-93b7-ffa38be18ad1.name: ij1-dimensions-zproject-2
874a0b0e-1787-4a9a-93b7-ffa38be18ad1.description: Performs a Z-Projection. Also supports other axes C-Project/T-Project.

9d5ad965-d63c-47bf-b890-61c50c4eb98f.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
9d5ad965-d63c-47bf-b890-61c50c4eb98f.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

677633d8-6a7e-46d2-b524-57b6366a7c36.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
677633d8-6a7e-46d2-b524-57b6366a7c36.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

cbf53217-72f1-475d-b94a-5e5645515220.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
cbf53217-72f1-475d-b94a-5e5645515220.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

763a2deb-3243-4a45-b885-81c20a7dce69.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
763a2deb-3243-4a45-b885-81c20a7dce69.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

744879be-f397-4597-aad2-c02bb3293316.name: ij1-feature-orientationj-2d
744879be-f397-4597-aad2-c02bb3293316.description: Extracts various orientation-related features from the input image. These are the same features as produced by the OrientationJ Analysis.

179851b9-3c85-428d-b742-1cb06ee47d56.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
179851b9-3c85-428d-b742-1cb06ee47d56.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

32cc7528-583a-4b89-bc99-ba1fe3580a1b.name: ij1-blur-median2d
32cc7528-583a-4b89-bc99-ba1fe3580a1b.description: Applies a median filter. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
